meta.title: ALKATER | Construction Company - Road Works, Asphalting, Civil Engineering
meta.description: ALKATER is a modern construction company specializing in the construction and maintenance of road networks, asphalting, road markings and infrastructure projects throughout Greece.
meta.ogDescription: Building Infrastructure That Stands the Test of Time. Road works, asphalting, civil engineering.

hero.slide1Subtitle: Technical excellence, decades of experience and commitment to quality — these are the values that build every project we undertake.
hero.slide2Subtitle: From small repairs to large infrastructure projects, quality is always our priority.
hero.slide3Subtitle: With decades of experience in the construction industry, we bring reliability to every step.

services.description: ALKATER specializes in the full range of infrastructure construction projects, focusing on quality, safety and innovation, with highly trained personnel and modern equipment.

projects.description: Explore a selection of our recent construction projects. Each image represents our commitment to quality and reliability.

blog.fallbackExcerpt: Why regular maintenance of road networks is an investment in safety, economy and sustainability of infrastructure.

contact.description: We are ready to take on the next construction challenge. Contact us for an estimate of your project.

contactForm.successMessage: Your message was sent successfully. We will contact you shortly.

footer.description: Construction company specializing in road works, public and private infrastructure projects in Epirus and Western Greece.
footer.euAlt: European Union - Co-financed by the European Union
footer.espaText: Co-financed by the European Union. Action "Support for the Establishment and Operation of New SMEs" — Programme "Competitiveness" ESPA 2021-2027

contactPage.heroSubtitle: We are always available to discuss new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities for collaboration.
contactPage.formSectionDesc: ALKATER is headquartered in Igoumenitsa, Thesprotia, with the capability to undertake projects throughout Epirus and Western Greece.

certPage.heroSubtitle: ALKATER is committed to the highest standards of quality, safety and environmental management, with internationally recognized certifications.
certPage.iso9001Desc: Certification of the quality management system for the design, construction and maintenance of public and private technical projects.
certPage.iso14001Desc: Commitment to environmental protection by minimizing the footprint in every construction project.
certPage.iso45001Desc: Implementation of strict safety protocols at all construction sites, protecting workers and partners.
certPage.iso50001Desc: Energy management certification for optimizing energy efficiency in every construction project.
certPage.meepDesc: Registered contractor in the Public Works Contractor Registry, with the ability to undertake public tenders.
certPage.peede: Panhellenic Union of Public Works Contractors (PEEDE)
certPage.steat: Association of Higher Class Technical Companies (STEAT)
certPage.chamber: Chamber of Commerce & Industry of Thesprotia
certPage.commitmentDesc: Every certification we hold represents a real commitment — not just a piece of paper. We apply these standards daily, at every construction site, in every project, without exceptions.

careers.heroSubtitle: Join a team that builds high-standard infrastructure. We are looking for talented people who share our passion for construction.
careers.ctaDesc: Send us your CV and we will contact you when a suitable position becomes available. We are always looking for talented people.
careers.job1Desc: We are looking for an experienced asphalt paver operator to join our field crews. Minimum 3 years of experience required.
careers.job2Desc: We are looking for a tracked excavator operator with a Category C operator's license. Experience in earthworks.
careers.job3Desc: Maintenance technician for our fleet of machinery. Knowledge of hydraulic and mechanical systems.
careers.job4Desc: Engineer specializing in road construction and infrastructure projects. Ability to manage construction sites and provide technical supervision.
careers.benefit1Desc: Compensation commensurate with experience and specialization
careers.benefit2Desc: Strict safety protocols at every construction site
careers.benefit3Desc: Continuous professional development and skills upgrade
careers.benefit5Desc: Long-term collaboration with steady growth trajectory
careers.benefit6Desc: Friendly work environment with mutual respect

team.heroSubtitle: ALKATER's strength is its people. A team of specialists with a passion for construction and dedication to quality.
team.dept1Desc: Engineers, surveyors and technicians specialized in road construction and infrastructure.
team.dept2Desc: Specialized machinery operators and workers with years of experience.
team.dept3Desc: Accounting, secretariat, legal support and procurement management.
team.dept4Desc: Machinery and vehicle maintenance technicians — ensuring uninterrupted operations.

about.heroSubtitle: Since 1998, ALKATER S.A. has been building infrastructure that stands the test of time. Headquartered in Igoumenitsa, our company is a benchmark in the construction sector of Epirus.
